summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Modules and Lessons CRUD functionality. All backend APIs working correctly (20/20 tests passed). All frontend admin and teacher UI flows working correctly.

issues: Minor: Missing aria-describedby for DialogContent (accessibility warning only, not blocking)

backend_modules_crud: DELETE /api/admin/modules/{id} - deletes module and its lessons
backend_lessons_crud: POST /api/admin/lessons - creates lesson with WYSIWYG content
PUT partial update - updates only specified fields
POST lesson with invalid module returns 404
backend_public_api: GET lessons for non-existent module returns 404
admin_ui_modules: Modules list displays with lessons count
Module creation form validates and saves
Edit module button opens sheet with current data
Lessons expand under module when clicked
admin_ui_lessons: Lesson form has description and content tabs
Edit lesson opens with existing data
Delete lesson button present in edit mode
teacher_ui_learning: Teacher dashboard loads with Learning tab
Modules displayed in Learning tab with lessons count
Click module opens modal with lessons list
Click lesson shows content with HTML rendering
Back button returns to lessons list

critical_code_review_comments: MOCKED API: modules_db and lessons_db are in-memory in server.py - data will be lost on server restart
Console warning: Missing DialogDescription for accessibility - minor issue
Console warning: quill 'bullet' format registration - cosmetic only, editor works
seed_data_creation: Test modules/lessons created during testing for validation, some cleaned up via delete tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Modules and Lessons feature fully implemented and tested. Backend uses in-memory storage (modules_db, lessons_db). react-quill-new package used for WYSIWYG editor. Admin credentials: test_admin@test.ru/test_admin. Teacher credentials: test@test.ru/test
